name: Reliance, Inc.
description: Reliance, Inc. is a leading diversified metal solutions provider and the largest metals service center company in North America. Through a vast network of over 75 distinct brands, the company processes and distributes a wide range of metal products, including steel, aluminum, and specialty metals, to a diverse customer base across various industries. Headquartered in the United States, Reliance focuses on providing value-added processing services and maintaining strong operational independence across its family of companies to deliver industrial-strength solutions and exceptional service to its clients.
